Where Winds Meet - Account Suspension Notice

2026-04-24 LATEST

Dear Wanderers,

We have been closely monitoring unauthorized third-party tools and abnormal in-game behavior.

Violations include cheating, speed hacks, macros, and other actions that disrupt fair play. Penalties are applied case by case and may include leaderboard removal, gameplay restrictions, or temporary/permanent bans.

Please continue to report any misconduct via the in-game system. Thank you for helping maintain a fair Jianghu.

Contact: wherewindsmeet@global.netease.com

Below is a list of accounts suspended for violations between March 20 and April 20:
